  "findings": [
    "Conductors are undersized for the load and run length, causing excessive voltage drop.",
    "Potential for overheating, equipment malfunction, and premature failure of the connected load."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the installation of the undersized conductors.",
    "Calculate the correct conductor size based on load current, run length, and allowable voltage drop (typically 3% for branch circuits, 5% total).",
    "Select and install compliant conductors using NEC Table 310.16 ampacity ratings adjusted for conditions of use."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing conductors that are undersized for the load and length violates NEC requirements for voltage drop and ampacity, presenting a fire hazard and risk of equipment damage. Because the work is actively in progress and non-compliant, it must be failed and corrected.",

    "NEC Article 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4 (Voltage Drop)"
  ]
